data.description: User-defined data variables seeded onto the preprocessing context (populated by interactive prompts from ishconfig/data.toml).

ignore.description: Additional ignore rules (on top of .ishignore and hardcoded defaults).

patterns.description: List of fnmatch-style glob patterns to ignore.

default_shell.description: Desired login shell (basename like 'zsh' or absolute path like '/usr/bin/zsh'). Applied via chsh at the end of 'ishfiles apply'.

source.description: Path to the ishfiles source folder (default: ~/.local/share/ishfiles).
